$comment: Tracked Claude Code session config for os-rebuild. Three wirings: (1) statusLine renders the latest loop trace in the status bar (always-visible, deterministic). (2) The UserPromptSubmit hook (session-feedback) makes the harness GOVERN the turn: it runs the real loop before the model sees the prompt; an explicit 'os:' command that completes at high confidence returns decision:block (model BYPASSED, real result shown — ENFORCED), everything else injects the trace + an operating protocol (model runs, STEERED). (3) The PreToolUse hook (confinement) blocks tool calls targeting sibling projects, keeping the session inside os-rebuild. All FAIL-OPEN. Wired candidates are still candidates (governance/rules/harness-admission.md), not admitted. Hooks/statusLine load at session start — open THIS folder as the project for any of it to apply.
